overall.description: First-person driving footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a vehicle traveling through a futuristic desert highway interchange. The camera approaches overhead road signs and passes under a large concrete overpass in the Badlands area, featuring clear skies and sparse desert vegetation.

agents.ego_description: driving steadily along the empty desert highway toward the overhead sign gantry

entered.detail: large highway gantry with directional signs pointing to SOCAL and PACIFICA
tall metal lattice electricity pylon with multiple power lines
tall poles with orange horizontal light fixtures
dry yellow grass and small bushes along the roadside
hazy mountains visible on the horizon
futuristic elevated highway structure with curved architecture

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a first-person driving perspective on a wide desert highway under clear blue skies. The vehicle approaches an overhead sign gantry displaying directions to SOCAL and PACIFICA, with power transmission towers and sparse desert vegetation visible along the roadside.

events.description: vehicle passes directly under the overhead highway sign gantry

agents.ego_description: continuing to drive forward, passing under the overhead sign structure and approaching the main overpass

entered.detail: large concrete highway overpass bridge spanning across the road
red cylindrical traffic barrels with white stripes

segments.scene_description: The vehicle passes under the overhead sign gantry and continues toward a large concrete overpass. The high voltage transmission tower passes by on the right, and red road barrels appear near the roadside. The scene remains open and sunlit with clear visibility.

events.description: entering the shadow cast by the large concrete overpass, creating a darker lighting condition

agents.ego_description: driving under the concrete overpass, moving through the shaded area beneath the bridge

segments.scene_description: The vehicle enters the shadow of the concrete overpass, causing a noticeable lighting change from bright sunlight to diffused shade. The camera drives directly under the massive concrete structure, with the transmission tower now visible in the distance behind.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person driving perspective on a wide desert highway that transitions from open, sunlit vistas into the deep shadow of a massive concrete structure. It begins under clear blue skies, approaching an overhead sign gantry directing traffic toward SOCAL and PACIFICA while power transmission towers line the roadside. As the vehicle passes beneath the gantry, the camera continues forward past red road barrels and high-voltage towers under bright, unobstructed light. The scene then shifts abruptly as the vehicle enters the shadow of a large concrete overpass, causing the lighting to change from brilliant sunlight to diffused shade. Finally, the camera drives directly under the massive structure, leaving the distant transmission towers behind in the open desert.
